query: What do you have by the Universal House of Justice?
response: The library holds 475 documents by the Universal House of Justice. Some notable titles include [Regarding Economic Life](https://siftersearch.com/document/12345?paraId=67890), [Marking the Bicentenary of the Birth of Bahá’u’lláh](https://siftersearch.com/document/12345?paraId=67891), and [Climate Change: Policies and Political Discourse](https://siftersearch.com/document/12345?paraId=67892). In these writings, the Universal House of Justice often emphasizes the importance of ["consultation and action"](https://oceanlibrary.com/some-text?paraId=abc) as essential tools for addressing contemporary challenges.

scores.diagnosis: The response provides a good overview of the documents available but lacks sufficient inline quotes to support the claims made about the Universal House of Justice's writings. To improve, it should integrate specific quotes from the documents to substantiate the claims about their themes and messages.
